data: Deputy Secretary, Department of Homeland Security

Began founding of Global Conductor, Inc. in January 2002. The Articles of Incorporation were approved March 2002.  I returned to Global Conductor in January 2021 following my service in the first Trump Administration.

I am eligible for a payment from the IBM Annual Incentive Program (AIP) for CY 2024 performance, payable in accordance with the terms and conditions of AIP in a lump sum in April 2025, less applicable withholding for taxes and any required payroll deductions. (2024-01-01)
As part of the sale agreement, a promissory note was executed that requires monthly payments through 2034. (2024-12-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan, but the plan sponsor no longer makes contributions. (2002-01-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan.  The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my departure from the company. (2021-06-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan. (2006-12-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan. (1997-10-01)
Pursuant to the company’s compensation plan, my unvested restricted stock units were forfeit upon my resignation from the company. (2021-06-01)
I will forfeit my unvested stock options upon separation. I will retain my vested stock options. Upon confirmation, I will exercise my stock options and divest the resulting stock. (2022-02-01)
Prospect House Media dba Ameritocracy will be made inactive upon my confirmation and will remain inactive for the duration of my appointment in the Federal government. (2022-07-01)
